note: All Neo Premier League media (images + video) lives in the public media library above. No binaries are committed to this repo. Reference assets by `id`; download them from the library, or attach them when running a skill in a web chatbot.

assets.description: Bare matte-black robot — the base every pose derives from.
Robot in a black athletic hoodie, full body.
Hooded camera-bar head portrait — the iconic 'face' shot.
Robot standing in the white chevron match kit.
Action: side volley with the ball.
Hooded portrait with heavy glitch/datamosh tear — hero treatment.
Two robots contesting a header over a stadium, glitch + telemetry.
Finished 'NEO_STYLE' poster — shows the overlay/type + HUD system.
